description_long: This is a metallic can of Del Monte Quality apple juice, featuring a vibrant green background with a large, realistic red apple illustration on the front. The can displays the Del Monte logo prominently at the top, with the word 'Manzana' (Spanish for apple) written in a flowing script beneath it. Nutritional information and product details are printed on one side, while the opposite side contains additional product and branding information. The can is topped with a standard aluminum pull tab, which is slightly raised and circular in shape. The surface of the can is glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek, polished appearance. The overall design is typical of single-serving juice cans found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, and convenience stores.
description: A glossy Del Monte apple juice can with a red apple illustration, green background, and prominent branding. Features a standard pull tab and nutritional information panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Del Monte logo, 'Manzana' text, and a large red apple illustration.
description_view_1: Side view with less visible branding, showing the can's curvature and some product text.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting both the apple illustration and part of the nutritional panel.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the nutritional information panel and side product details.
